word: G3885 - παραλυτικός - paralytikós - par-al-oo-tee-kos' - That had the palsy

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: That had the palsy
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a derivative of G3886; as if dissolved, that is, “paralytic”: - that had (sick of) the palsy.
